name: Stream Processing (Flink, Kafka Streams, windowing)
description: 流处理:Flink、Kafka Streams、窗口与水位线

detector.inline: profile.code_domains.some(d=>['streaming','stream_processing','flink','kafka_streams','windowing','watermark'].includes(d)) || profile.repo_signals.some(s=>/\b(apache flink|kafka streams|spark streaming|stream processing|tumbling window|sliding window|watermark|out.?of.?order|exactly.?once|stateful operator|checkpoint)\b/i.test(s)) ? 0.9 : 0
